Name: WitnessConceal
Prompt: A terrified witness asks what they saw.
OptionText: Tell them it was smoke and panic, not divinity.

Name: WitnessProclaim
Prompt: A terrified witness asks what they saw.
OptionText: Let the witness call it a miracle and bind your fate to the rumor.

Name: EgyptHideOracle
Prompt: The priesthood begs you to preserve the Radiant Voice.
OptionText: Keep the oracle hidden and work through trusted intermediaries.

Name: EgyptShareOracle
Prompt: The archive reveals a machine where a god should be.
OptionText: Share the oracle's truth with a small circle and build a guarded covenant around it.

Name: EgyptExposeOracle
Prompt: The archive reveals a machine where a god should be.
OptionText: Expose the oracle as an artifact and break the priestly monopoly.

Name: EgyptFamineAgronomy
Prompt: The floodplain fails and the temple granary is under guard.
OptionText: Quietly repair irrigation and seed use so the village survives without public miracle.

Name: EgyptFaminePublicMiracle
Prompt: The floodplain fails and the temple granary is under guard.
OptionText: Use visible healing and light to force a harvest ritual into a public miracle.

Name: EgyptFaminePriestlyAlliance
Prompt: The floodplain fails and the temple granary is under guard.
OptionText: Strike a bargain with the priesthood and control food through ritual rationing.

Name: EgyptFamineRefuse
Prompt: The floodplain fails and the temple granary is under guard.
OptionText: Refuse divine intervention and let local power absorb the blame for the famine.

Name: GreeceJoinSpectacle
Prompt: The storm-ruler offers shared divinity.
OptionText: Stand beside them and make spectacle into power.

Name: GreeceRedirectProphecy
Prompt: The storm-ruler offers shared divinity.
OptionText: Redirect the prophecy and force the ruler into a narrower, accountable role.

Name: GreeceDefySpectacle
Prompt: The storm-ruler offers shared divinity.
OptionText: Defy the ruler and force truth into the open.

Name: GreeceWarbandNegotiate
Prompt: A warband advances on the sanctuary road.
OptionText: Broker terms and redirect the raid toward tribute instead of slaughter.

Name: GreeceWarbandOmen
Prompt: A warband advances on the sanctuary road.
OptionText: Stage an omen in the pass and make the raiders believe the mountain rejects them.

Name: GreeceWarbandStrike
Prompt: A warband advances on the sanctuary road.
OptionText: Strike first and break the warband before they reach the shrine.

Name: ItalicLawByService
Prompt: The bronze lawgiver asks what order is for.
OptionText: Define order as service and measured protection.

Name: ItalicLawByDomination
Prompt: The bronze lawgiver asks what order is for.
OptionText: Define order as rule backed by fear and permanence.

Name: ItalicLawReplace
Prompt: The bronze lawgiver asks what order is for.
OptionText: Take command of the law machinery yourself and replace the keeper outright.

Name: ItalicBoundaryArbitrate
Prompt: Two clans demand the same stretch of sacred boundary.
OptionText: Measure the land openly and impose a lawful split both sides can see.

Name: ItalicBoundaryRitual
Prompt: Two clans demand the same stretch of sacred boundary.
OptionText: Stage a boundary fire rite and let fear of taboo settle the dispute.

Name: ItalicBoundaryEngineer
Prompt: Two clans demand the same stretch of sacred boundary.
OptionText: Redirect water and road access so the dispute becomes economically irrelevant.

Name: ItalicBoundaryPurge
Prompt: Two clans demand the same stretch of sacred boundary.
OptionText: Back one claimant with force and end the dispute through fear.

Name: EndingReturn
Prompt: The apparatus opens one final path.
OptionText: Return to the future and face what your myth changed.

Name: EndingRemain
Prompt: The apparatus opens one final path.
OptionText: Remain here and become the final composite remembered by later cultures.

Name: EndingDismantle
Prompt: The apparatus opens one final path.
OptionText: Dismantle the apparatus and sever as much temporal contamination as you can.

Name: EndingReplaceCompanion
Prompt: The apparatus opens one final path.
OptionText: Replace one companion-deity and formalize a new order under your name.

Name: EndingFragment
Prompt: The apparatus opens one final path.
OptionText: Scatter the truth and your legacy so no single culture can own it.
